skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem: The mean score of 10 players in a soccer tournament was 11.2 goals. If the player with the highest individual score is removed, the mean score of the remaining 9 players is 10 goals. What was the highest score?
rationale: Total of 10 players: 10 × 11.2 = 112. Total of remaining 9 after removing top: 9 × 10 = 90. Highest score = 112 − 90 = 22. Choices B, C, and D result from computation errors with totals or means.
